name: class_with_string_member
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class declaration containing a string-typed member variable.

name: class_with_queue_member
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class declaration containing a queue-typed member variable.

name: class_new_constructor_declaration
description: Code should include a class constructor declared as new() inside a SystemVerilog class.

name: class_new_expression_instantiation
description: Code should include a class instantiation using the new expression outside the class body.

name: class_new_with_unsupported_string_member
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class containing a string member, a new() constructor, and an external instantiation with new.

name: class_new_with_unsupported_queue_member
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog class containing a queue member, a new() constructor, and an external instantiation with new.
